title: Hit Me Baby One More Time
why_this_song: Hit Me Baby One More Time by Britney Spears (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Hit me, baby, one more time
Oh, baby, baby, the reason I breathe is you (oh, yeah)
Oh, pretty baby, there's nothing that I wouldn't do
Oh, baby, baby, how was I supposed to know

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hit me, baby, one more time

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hit Me Baby One More Time" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hit Me Baby One More Time"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Britney Spears one question about "Hit Me Baby One More Time", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Britney Spears sobre "Hit Me Baby One More Time", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hit Me Baby One More Time" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hit Me Baby One More Time" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Hit Me Baby One More Time", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Hit Me Baby One More Time", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Hit Me Baby One More Time" was released in 1998. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hit Me Baby One More Time" foi lançada em 1998. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
